response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and open-source development experience with a focus on testability and diverse technical environments. However, his background lacks direct alignment with the core requirements of the role, particularly in C++ (only 1-2 years inferred), large-scale cloud compute infrastructure, and explicit technical leadership in cloud/DevOps contexts. His mentoring and architectural contributions are promising but not sufficiently highlighted for this role.
strengths: Diverse technical experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, indicating adaptability and broad problem-solving skills.
Strong open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) and mentoring/training initiatives (e.g., workshops, Selenium courses).
Proven ability to design and architect systems (e.g., real-time note-taking apps, geo-data platforms) with a focus on testability and user experience.
concerns: Limited demonstrated experience with C++ (only inferred from National Instruments role, ~1-2 years), far below the 8-year requirement.
No explicit evidence of large-scale cloud compute infrastructure or distributed systems leadership, a core requirement for the role.
Technical leadership experience is present but not clearly tied to cloud/DevOps teams or production-level cloud architecture.
